title: EdgeChainDB 20-Node IoT Validation Report

scenarios.name: Docker Compose topology
scenarios.details: Compose defines an isolated gateway network and 20 persistent device nodes

scenarios.name: Python test suite
scenarios.details: The unit, API, tamper, idempotency, and 20-device tests passed

scenarios.name: Gateway health and readiness
scenarios.details: Gateway returned a healthy status

scenarios.name: Twenty-node concurrent ingestion
scenarios.details: 20 nodes concurrently enrolled and delivered 160 signed events

scenarios.name: Initial security-device enrollment
scenarios.details: A new Ed25519 device identity was enrolled

scenarios.name: Valid signed event
scenarios.details: A correctly signed event was accepted

scenarios.name: Retry-safe duplicate delivery
scenarios.details: The same signed event was accepted idempotently without a second row

scenarios.name: Idempotent same-key enrollment
scenarios.details: Restart-style enrollment with the same key was idempotent

scenarios.name: Conflicting key enrollment rejection
scenarios.details: The gateway rejected takeover of an existing device id

scenarios.name: Forged signature rejection
scenarios.details: An event signed by an attacker key was rejected

scenarios.name: Payload tampering rejection
scenarios.details: Changing a signed payload invalidated its signature

scenarios.name: Out-of-order sequence rejection
scenarios.details: A large sequence jump was rejected

scenarios.name: Broken micro-chain rejection
scenarios.details: A valid signature with the wrong predecessor was rejected

scenarios.name: Checkpoint recovery
scenarios.details: A restarted device resumed from the gateway checkpoint without forking

scenarios.name: Seal remaining telemetry
scenarios.details: All pending events were committed to finalized blocks

scenarios.name: Block finality and quorum
scenarios.details: Every block is finalized and has the required signatures

scenarios.name: Merkle inclusion proof
scenarios.details: The selected event is cryptographically included in its block

scenarios.name: Tampered Merkle proof rejection
scenarios.details: Changing the event hash invalidated the inclusion proof

scenarios.name: Complete ledger verification
scenarios.details: All event signatures, micro-chains, Merkle roots, block links, and quorum signatures verified

scenarios.name: Persistent restart recovery
scenarios.details: Gateway restart preserved keys, blocks, events, and audit validity

notes: Docker is not installed in the execution environment. The Compose file was validated structurally, while the same HTTP/API and persistence code was executed through a local 20-node integration harness.
Administrative enrollment is intentionally unauthenticated in this research testbed; production deployment must add mTLS or another authenticated control plane.
